_doc: Canonical PlanBundle round-trip fixture shared between mobile (TypeScript) and desktop (Rust). Both implementations must pass all vectors. hash_vectors validates the FNV-1a implementation; round_trip validates bundle serialize/deserialize fidelity.

hash_vectors._comment: fnv1a('') — empty string equals the FNV offset_basis unchanged.

round_trip._comment: serializeBundle('mobile', input_project, 1749600000000) then deserializeBundle must reproduce input_project fields. Hashes in files are recomputed on serialize, so stored hash values in input_project.files are not significant — what matters is that the content round-trips losslessly.

goal.md.content:
# Goal

Build a fixture-validated plan bundle.

scope.md.content:
## In scope
- Serialize
- Deserialize

## Out of scope
- GitHub transport

sync_manifest._comment: buildSyncManifest([input_project]) must produce this shape. Actual hash values are computed by fnv1a(file.content) — implementations verify this dynamically.
